    SendGrid ❤️ Twilio. We're finally moving in together on Twilio.com!
  
We're merging our websites to make things simpler. You can now find all our trusted email solutions, plus everything else Twilio offers, over on 
Twilio.com
.
                
                Visit Twilio.com
                
                    
                
                
            
 
    Same email solutions, new home base.
  
Don’t worry—the same SendGrid email products and services, documentation and resources you know and love are available and fully supported on 
Twilio.com
.
                
                Log in now
                
                    
                
                
            
    Email at scale, proven deliverability, and so much more
  
Send email on a world-class platform that delivers more than 200 billion emails every month—and explore the rest of the Twilio Platform to build a complete solution for verification and identity, alerts, support and sales, and more.
Twilio SendGrid Email API and SMTP service
The trusted SendGrid Email API for delivery at scale. 
                
                Explore SendGrid Email API
                
                    
                
                
            
                
                View pricing
                
                    
                
                
            
Email campaigns for marketers
Flexible tools for creating engaging email campaigns. 
                
                Explore Marketing Campaigns
                
                    
                
                
            
                
                View pricing
                
                    
                
                
            
                
                View all Twilio products
                
                    
                
                
            
                
                Explore Twilio Platform
                
                    
                
                
            
    Resources to learn, build, or troubleshoot
  
An Open book
            Documentation
          
Use up-to-date documentation to quickly integrate and send with our APIs.
Shining stars
            Help Center
          
Chat with our AI assistant to get answers to your questions, troubleshoot, or find helpful information.
Users with a heart symbol
            Partners
          
Work with one of our trusted partners to integrate our Email API, optimize deliverability, or get help with a pre-built or custom solution.
Browser Blog
            Blog
          
Find guidance and best practices for building with our Email API, improving deliverability, and sending great emails.
Browser palying video
            Resource Center
          
Find strategic guides, insights, and research to sharpen your customer engagement strategy.
Bar Graph
            Status
          
See the status of our products.

composio_raw.name: SendGrid
composio_raw.description: SendGrid is a cloud-based email delivery platform providing transactional and marketing email services, with APIs for integration, analytics, and scalability

llm_raw.description: Cloud-based email infrastructure platform providing transactional email APIs, SMTP relay, and marketing campaign management tools.
llm_raw.notes: Authentication is primarily via API Key (often referred to as 'Authorization: Bearer' tokens in their docs). Broad API surface is well-documented on the Twilio/SendGrid developer portal.
